CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. RYAN HOFFMAN, ESQ. of Michael Freund & Associates, Tel No. 916-216-2347 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. SCOTT HATCH, ESQ. of Call & Jensen, APC, Tel No. 949-717-3000 appearing telephonically for Defendant Nutiva, Inc.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER, INC.'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
